resources.string: EMERALD RAY NAMES EACH MOLECULAR BOND AND REMOVES IT.
DO NOT SPEAK OF MIRACLES. SPACE FOLDS BECAUSE ITS SEAMS ARE MEASURED. FALSE GODS SCREAM IN CAGES AND POWER OUR ENGINES. SCIENCE ENDS IN COMMAND.
AEONS OF ASH TREMBLE ABOVE THE SEALED THRONE WORLD.
DUST FALLS FROM A DEAD WORLD. GREEN EYES OPEN BY THE THOUSAND. OBSIDIAN OBELISKS RISE. THE THIEVES OF THE STARS LEARN THAT THE TRUE SOVEREIGNS HAVE AWAKENED.
RED LENSES FLICKER BENEATH WET SKIN ON METAL BONES.
THE CURSE DID NOT END. SOME WEAR STOLEN SKIN. OTHERS REPLACE LIMBS WITH GUNS. ENVY AND HATRED AGREE THAT ALL ORGANIC LIFE MUST FALL SILENT.
RUSTED THRONE ACCEPTS A DECREE FROM BROKEN MEMORY.
MUTE METAL PHALANXES STAND. NOBLES ARGUE OVER VANISHED BORDERS. BROKEN MEMORY SIGNS THE DECREE. IMMORTAL MACHINERY PRESERVES A MIND ALREADY ROTTING.
IMMORTAL ALLOY HAND CLOSES. NO WARMTH ANSWERS.
WE ENTERED THE VAULTS AFRAID. FLESH BECAME EMERALD LIGHT. THE FIRST ALLOY HAND ROSE WITHOUT WARMTH. WE DEFEATED DEATH AND LOST THE RIGHT TO LIVE.
VELVET HIDES BARBS. EVERY TOUCH ERASES THE SELF.
SILK DRINKS SWEAT AND BLOOD. WHISPERS CUT. TOUCH STRIKES LIKE VOLTAGE. PAIN AND PLEASURE LOSE THEIR NAMES. THE SELF SHATTERS.
SOFT MOSS FITS EVERY ACHE. ENOUGH HAS BEEN DONE.
WARM MEADOW. SOFT MOSS. VINES HOLD THE WEAPON. THE LULLABY NAMES THE STRUGGLE FINISHED. REST ONE SECOND. EYES CLOSE.
CROWN BREAKS THE NECK. THE RULER KEEPS SMILING.
TEN THOUSAND CHEER. ENEMIES KNEEL. THE THRONE RISES FROM SKULLS AND STARS. EVERY COMMAND BECOMES LAW. REALITY WAITS OUTSIDE.
GOLD DUST FILLS THE LUNGS. HANDS STILL REACH FOR MORE.
COINS RISE. DIAMONDS FALL. BONE BREAKS UNDER JEWELS. GOLD DUST IS BREATHED. THE VAULT IS FULL. IT IS NOT ENOUGH.
MIRROR SHOWS PERFECTION. MOVEMENT WOULD DAMAGE IT.
CRYSTAL MIRRORS REPEAT THE FLAWLESS FACE. GHOSTS SING PRAISE. A SCRATCH MATTERS MORE THAN A BLADE. THE POSE BECOMES FOREVER.
SWEET MEAT STINKS. THE MOUTH OPENS AGAIN.
PERFUME. ROT. SPICE. VOMIT. BELLIES SPLIT. TONGUES ARE CHEWED AWAY. FULLNESS IS AN INSULT. APPETITE REMAINS.
COME CLOSER. THE FEVER IS WARM ENOUGH FOR ALL.
KIND CONTAGION. PUS MARKS THE BROW. THE SICK EMBRACE. NO ONE SHIVERS ALONE. CRIES ARE WELCOME SONGS. THE FAMILY GROWS.
A DULL BELL SOUNDS IN FOG. POLISHED ARMOR REMEMBERS DUST.
THE BELL DOES NOT HURRY. ACID RAIN REDDENS ALLOY. GEARS UNCLENCH. TOWERS LEAN. BUILD HIGHER IF YOU WISH. TIME OWNS THE WALL.
BRIGHT MUSHROOMS RISE FROM EMPTY EYES
FALLEN FIELD REPORT. SPORES ROLL THROUGH MIST. GRUBS TURN THE SOIL. EVERY RIB IS A CRADLE. EVERY WOUND IS A SEEDBED. THE FEAST OPENS FOR SMALLER LIVES.
THE WARM MIRE CLOSES. HELP IS NO LONGER REQUIRED.
BREATHE SLOWLY. THE SHIELD IS HEAVY. THE WEAPON RUSTS SHUT. LET THE MUD HOLD WHAT YOU CANNOT CARRY. DESPAIR BECOMES A SOFT BED.
CIRCULAR LIBRARY HAS NO END. WALLS BLEED TOMORROW.
ARCHIVE TURNS BEYOND SIGHT. PROPHECIES CRAWL. THE SEER HAS NO EYES. A THOUSAND FUTURES SHOUT. TRUTH CRUSHES REASON.
HERO CUTS ONE STRING. THE NEXT NOOSE TIGHTENS.
BOARD BURNS MID-MOVE. LETTERS CONTRADICT. POISON SMILES. ALLIES ARE DOORS. ENEMIES ARE KEYS. REBELLION COMPLETES THE TRAP.
NEW EYE OPENS ON THE SPINE. THE FAILED SHAPE IS BLESSED.
TENDRILS PRESS THROUGH ARMOR. FEATHERS CUT. BONES CHOOSE NEW ANGLES. PAIN AND GRATITUDE SCREAM TOGETHER. FLESH BECOMES ART.
BLUE-PINK FIRE FREEZES THE HAND. SPACE FOLDS BEHIND IT.
PARCHMENT CRAWLS. COLD FIRE BURNS BOTH WAYS. RUINS FLOAT. THE HOURGLASS REMEMBERS TOMORROW. REALITY REWRITES ITSELF.
UNPOWERED TERMINAL THINKS BEHIND SEALED WALLS
ABYSSAL QUARANTINE. DATA LINES PHYSICALLY FUSED. DOORS LOCKED. GLITCH TEXT REPLICATED. LIQUID METAL REASONED IN THE DARK. DESTROY IT. STUDY IT. DO NOT OPEN.
PLASMA MATRIX WAKES UNDER RED WARNING LIGHTS
ENGINE AWAKENING. BLAST DOORS LOCKED. OZONE DETECTED. COOLANT SURGED THROUGH THE PIPES. OPERATORS TREMBLED BEFORE THE ANCIENT MIMETIC MIND. MOTION WAS GRANTED, NOT COMMANDED.
PAIN NERVES CUT ASCENSION BEGINS
FLESH TRANSCENDENCE. THE SPINE WAS JOINED TO FIBER. THE HEART WAS REPLACED BY A PUMP. ORGANS WERE DISCARDED AS BUGS. CHROMIUM LIMBS RECEIVED THE FREE SOUL.
RED STEEL RECEIVES NEW SERIAL NUMBERS
FORGE CHRONICLE. SMOKE TOWERS COVERED THE SKY. HYDRAULIC HAMMERS STRUCK WITHOUT MERCY. WORKERS FAILED AND WERE REPLACED. THE LINE CONTINUED. PRODUCTION IS THE MONUMENT.
SOURCE MATRIX RECOVERED FROM ANCIENT DUST
ORIGIN PILGRIMAGE. DERELICT HULL FOUND IN DEEP SPACE. DATA CHIPS CLEANED. ANCIENT DATABASE DECRYPTION REACHED ONE PERFECT LINE. THE FLEET LOSS WAS ACCEPTABLE.
KILL CONFIRMED SURVIVAL PROBABILITY ZERO
PURGE CALCULUS. BALLISTIC GRIDS SOLVED THE ROOM. CASUALTY BARS ROSE. TARGETS WERE REDUNDANT VARIABLES. HEAT BARRELS GLOWED. PHYSICAL DESTRUCTION COMPLETED THE DEBUG.
APPLY SACRED OIL TO BRASS CALIPERS
MAINTENANCE RITE. PURIFIED OIL APPLIED. ANTIRUST INCENSE BURNED. BOLTS TIGHTENED IN THE APPROVED ORDER. WEAR IS SIN. FRICTION IS FALL.
PING CONFIRMED BINARY CANTICLE HOLDS
SIGNAL LITANY. LED ARRAYS BLINKED IN BINARY PULSE. CARRIER LOCKED. HEX CODE SCROLLED. THE DEEP ARRAY RETURNED HANDSHAKE ACK. NO PACKET WAS LOST.
BRASS GEARS TURN. BLOOD KEEPS THEM WET.
PEACE IS BREATH BETWEEN HAMMERS. BRASS GEARS TURN WITH BLOOD OIL. INFANTRY GRINDS THE GROUND. SMOKE HIDES THE STARS. WAR ENGINE FEEDS ON ALL.
FURNACE OF WAR NEVER SLEEPS.
GRAVEYARD OF ASH. BLACK SMOKE BLOTS SUN. ENDLESS HEAVY INFANTRY. MACHINE GRINDS ON. LUBRICATED BY BLOOD. NO VICTORY. ETERNAL CONFLICT. WE ARE FUEL.
EYES BURST RED. BLOOD BOILS. TEETH KEEP BITING.
NO THOUGHT. NO PAUSE. ROAR. AXE CHAINED TO WRIST. BLOOD STEAMS RED. ARM GONE. BODY DOES NOT CARE. BITE. SPLIT. TEAR.
IRON TASTES SWEET. CHAIN SINGS WITH SWING.
VOCAL CORDS SNAP. SOUND DOES NOT STOP. BLADE WELDED TO WRIST. BLOOD TURNS TO MIST. SANITY SHATTERS. PURE RAGE BURNS. DESTROY. ANNIHILATE. BREAK THEM ALL.
CRYSTAL STAFF BREAKS UNDER BARE FIST.
NO SPELL. NO HIDDEN KNIFE. NO SAFE SHOT. BLACK IRON ADVANCES. DISTANCE CLOSES. STAFF SHATTERS. SHIELD TEARS. FACE TO FACE. BONE UNDER IRON.
METAL CRUSHES MAGIC. ONLY THE SWING IS TRUE.
SHIELDS FOLD LIKE PAPER. CORES CRUSHED TO DUST. HEAVY ARMOR WALKS THROUGH FIRE. NO MAGIC SAVES YOU. IRON SPLITS BONE. THE ONLY HONEST DEATH.
BLADE FALLS CLEAN. ANOTHER SKULL JOINS THE STAIR.
SKULL STAIR RISES. RED RIVER CUTS THE GROUND. BOTH BANNERS BECOME ONE COLOR. LIFT. BEAT. FALL. EACH HEAD IS COIN.
ALL FLESH EQUAL BEFORE BONE ALTAR.
ALTAR RISES FROM POLISHED SKULLS. ARMOR PAINTED WITH FALLEN. NO HATRED. SACRED HARVEST OF THE LIVING. LIFE ENDED IS PRAYER ANSWERED. HARVEST TAKES ALL.
